metadata.description: stoating's Claude Code plugins — skills and tools for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: polylith
plugins.description: Clojure Polylith skill — components, bases, projects, interfaces, poly commands, workspace configuration, profiles, incremental testing, and setup.

plugins.name: aero
plugins.description: Clojure Aero skill — read-config, tag literals (#env, #profile, #include, #ref, #or, #join, #merge), resolvers, profiles, extending with custom tags, and patterns for secrets, components, and schema validation.

plugins.name: babashka
plugins.description: Clojure Babashka skill — fast-starting bb scripts, bb.edn tasks, built-in namespaces, deps, pods, shell/process interop, CLIs, and SCI compatibility.

plugins.name: clojure-mcp
plugins.description: ClojureMCP skill — MCP server setup, CLI assistant and Claude Desktop integration, nREPL connection, tool profiles, config.edn, custom tools/prompts/resources, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: integrant
plugins.description: Clojure Integrant skill — data-driven application architecture, init-key, halt-key!, suspend/resume, refs, refsets, composite keys, derived keywords, profiles, vars, expand-key, and REPL workflow.

plugins.name: flow-storm
plugins.description: Clojure FlowStorm skill - ClojureStorm setup, vanilla tracing, ClojureScript/shadow debugging, instrumentation controls, data windows, nREPL outputs, remote debugging, and trace limits.

plugins.name: hiccup
plugins.description: Clojure Hiccup skill - HTML-as-data syntax, hiccup2.core rendering, escaping, raw HTML, render modes, page/form helpers, and safe server-side HTML generation.

plugins.name: malli
plugins.description: Clojure Malli skill - data-driven schemas, validation, explain/humanize, coercion, transformers, generators, function schemas, registries, JSON Schema, Swagger, and CLJS usage.

plugins.name: portal
plugins.description: Clojure Portal skill — tap-driven data inspection, portal.api, viewers, datafy/nav, nREPL middleware, remote clients, CLI usage, and editor launchers.

plugins.name: reagent
plugins.description: ClojureScript Reagent skill — Hiccup components, ratoms, reactions, rendering roots, React interop, hooks, compiler options, SSR, controlled inputs, and React 19 setup.

plugins.name: replicant
plugins.description: Clojure Replicant skill — data-driven DOM and string rendering, hiccup syntax, aliases, event handlers, life-cycle hooks, CSS transitions, and node memory.

plugins.name: reitit
plugins.description: Clojure/ClojureScript Reitit skill — route syntax, Ring router, middleware, coercion (malli/spec/schema), OpenAPI/Swagger docs, frontend browser routing, and interceptors.

plugins.name: shadow-cljs
plugins.description: ClojureScript shadow-cljs skill - project setup, shadow-cljs.edn builds, targets, watch/release commands, dev-http, REPLs, npm interop, testing, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: clojure
plugins.description: Clojure style guide skill — formatting, naming, idiomatic patterns, namespace organization, functions, macros, documentation, and testing conventions.

plugins.name: datomic
plugins.description: Clojure Datomic skill — Datomic Local/Pro/Cloud setup, schema and data modeling, transactions, query and pull, Client/Peer/Local APIs, Datomic Cloud Ions, analytics, operations, and best practices.

plugins.name: dataspex
plugins.description: Clojure Dataspex skill — point-and-click data browser, inspect/uninspect API, atoms, taps, Datascript/Datomic/Datalevin/Datahike connections, browser extension, remote server, and custom rendering protocols (IRenderInline, IRenderDictionary, IRenderTable, IRenderSource, IRenderHiccup, IPrefersView, IDiffable).

plugins.name: nexus
plugins.description: Clojure Nexus skill — zero-dependency action dispatch, actions/effects/placeholders, system->state, batching, async effects, nexus.registry, interceptors, fail-fast strategy, and Dataspex action-log integration.

plugins.name: portfolio
plugins.description: ClojureScript Portfolio skill — defscene, framework adapters (Reagent/React/Replicant/Rum/Dumdom), shadow-cljs :portfolio target, scene organization, UI customization (background/viewport/grid/CSS), tap> REPL usage, and disabling in production.

plugins.name: cheshire
plugins.description: Clojure Cheshire skill — JSON/SMILE/CBOR encoding and decoding, generate-string, parse-string, custom encoders, JSONable protocol, factory configuration, lazy parsing, and anti-patterns.

plugins.name: ring
plugins.description: Clojure Ring skill — Ring spec, handlers, middleware, request/response maps, Jetty adapter, WebSockets, sessions, cookies, params, async handlers, and anti-patterns.
